name: Babu Singh Kushwaha
profileSummary: Babu Singh Kushwaha is an Indian politician from Uttar Pradesh, serving as chief of the Jan Adhikar Party and former Family Welfare Minister in the Uttar Pradesh government under Mayawati. He was also one of Behenji’s trusted backroom boys, who besides working at the grassroots looked after the party’s administrative affairs. In the 2024 Indian general election, he won from the Jaunpur Lok Sabha constituency on a Samajwadi Party ticket, becoming a member of Lok Sabha for the first time.
